'''âzh-t-t''' ('''kazhatat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heaven|heaven]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heaven|heaven]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-t-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazhatat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhatat|thizhatat]] || [[word:jizhatat|jizhatat]] || [[word:shizhatat|shizhatat]] || [[word:kizhatat|kizhatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhatat|thuthuzhatat]] || [[word:jujuzhatat|jujuzhatat]] || [[word:shushuzhatat|shushuzhatat]] || [[word:kukuzhatat|kukuzhatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhatat|thuzhatat]] || [[word:juzhatat|juzhatat]] || [[word:shuzhatat|shuzhatat]] || [[word:kuzhatat|kuzhatat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhatat|thuzhatat]] || [[word:juzhatat|juzhatat]] || [[word:shuzhatat|shuzhatat]] || [[word:kuzhatat|kuzhatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhatat|thezhatat]] || [[word:jezhatat|jezhatat]] || [[word:shezhatat|shezhatat]] || [[word:kezhatat|kezhatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhatat|thothozhatat]] || [[word:jojozhatat|jojozhatat]] || [[word:shoshozhatat|shoshozhatat]] || [[word:kokozhatat|kokozhatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhatat|thozhatat]] || [[word:jozhatat|jozhatat]] || [[word:shozhatat|shozhatat]] || [[word:kozhatat|kozhatat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhatat|thozhatat]] || [[word:jozhatat|jozhatat]] || [[word:shozhatat|shozhatat]] || [[word:kozhatat|kozhatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhatat|thĂŠzhatat]] || [[word:jĂŠzhatat|jĂŠzhatat]] || [[word:shĂŠzhatat|shĂŠzhatat]] || [[word:kĂŠzhatat|kĂŠzhatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhatat|thathazhatat]] || [[word:jajazhatat|jajazhatat]] || [[word:shashazhatat|shashazhatat]] || [[word:kakazhatat|kakazhatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhatat|thazhatat]] || [[word:jazhatat|jazhatat]] || [[word:shazhatat|shazhatat]] || [[word:kazhatat|kazhatat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhatat|thazhatat]] || [[word:jazhatat|jazhatat]] || [[word:shazhatat|shazhatat]] || [[word:kazhatat|kazhatat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhatat|shazhatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhatat|goshazhatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhatat|gokishazhatat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhatatnĂŒ|shazhatatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatatnknĂŒ|goshazhatatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatatnĂŒ|gokishazhatatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhatatshĂ«|shazhatatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkshĂ«|goshazhatatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhatatshĂ«|gokishazhatatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatatro|shazhatatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkro|goshazhatatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatatro|gokishazhatatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatatmu|shazhatatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkmu|goshazhatatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatatmu|gokishazhatatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhatatsher|shazhatatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhatatnksher|goshazhatatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhatatsher|gokishazhatatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhatatng|shazhatatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkng|goshazhatatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhatatng|gokishazhatatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhatatya|shazhatatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkya|goshazhatatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhatatya|gokishazhatatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhatatyam|shazhatatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkyam|goshazhatatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhatatyam|gokishazhatatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatatnĂŒshĂ«|shazhatatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhatatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhatatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatatnĂŒro|shazhatatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatatnknĂŒro|goshazhatatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatatnĂŒro|gokishazhatatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatatnĂŒmu|shazhatatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatatnknĂŒmu|goshazhatatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatatnĂŒmu|gokishazhatatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatatshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhatatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhatatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhatatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatatshĂ«ro|shazhatatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkshĂ«ro|goshazhatatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatatshĂ«ro|gokishazhatatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatatshĂ«mu|shazhatatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkshĂ«mu|goshazhatatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatatshĂ«mu|gokishazhatatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatatronĂŒ|shazhatatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkronĂŒ|goshazhatatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatatronĂŒ|gokishazhatatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatatroshĂ«|shazhatatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkroshĂ«|goshazhatatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatatroshĂ«|gokishazhatatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatatromu|shazhatatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkromu|goshazhatatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatatromu|gokishazhatatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatatmunĂŒ|shazhatatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkmunĂŒ|goshazhatatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatatmunĂŒ|gokishazhatatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatatmushĂ«|shazhatatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkmushĂ«|goshazhatatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatatmushĂ«|gokishazhatatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatatmuro|shazhatatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatatnkmuro|goshazhatatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatatmuro|gokishazhatatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
